log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+6=25 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 40 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:4+6=10 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:7+6=13 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:15+6=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician.
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician healed for 7 HP. HP: 34/67
Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Archmage WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:17+6=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:14+6=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 27 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:19+4=23 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician.
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician healed for 9 HP. HP: 16/67
--- Archmage's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Hobgoblin — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 24 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 12] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
